blocked_reason: Pi-CEO MCP returned LINEAR_API_KEY not set on 2026-05-17.

issues.title: RA Wave 1: generate and approve remaining OpenAI Max keyframes
issues.description:
Generate the remaining approved keyframes from `remotion-studio/briefs/ra-wave-1-prize-upgrade/09-openai-max-keyframe-runbook.md`.

Current approved keyframe:
- Scene 2 problem montage: `generated-keyframes/scene-02-problem-montage-openai-max.png`

Generate next, in order:
1. Scene 6 Australian-built identity
2. Scene 1 silent hook
3. Scene 3 product-truth transition plate
4. Scene 4 BYO storage proof plate
5. Scene 8-10 CTA thumbnail/background

Acceptance:
- no fake product UI
- no readable private data
- no recognisable faces
- no generated legal/standards text
- each approved image copied into `generated-keyframes/`
- `12-generated-keyframe-log.md` updated with provenance
- commit and push after each approved image batch

issues.title: RA Wave 1: source first Artlist licensed asset pack
issues.description:
Use Artlist.io credits only, per `remotion-studio/briefs/ra-wave-1-prize-upgrade/10-artlist-production-picklist.md`.

First downloads only:
1. one music bed
2. one transition whoosh family
3. one tactile UI click
4. two restoration/admin texture clips
5. one Australian trade-business texture clip
6. one forensic/data-custody texture clip

Acceptance:
- commercial/social license confirmed for every asset
- asset IDs, titles, URLs, license terms, download timestamp, and intended use recorded in `07-licensing-proof-sheet.md`
- no visible third-party logos, addresses, licence plates, claim forms, insurer branding, or customer data
- commit and push proof sheet update

issues.title: RA Wave 1: assemble AI-editor timeline from approved keyframes and Artlist assets
issues.description:
Build the next-stage edit using `remotion-studio/briefs/ra-wave-1-prize-upgrade/11-next-stage-edit-decision-list.json`.

Inputs:
- original Remotion render is reference only
- approved OpenAI Max keyframes
- licensed Artlist assets with proof recorded
- verified product UI/reference frames only

Acceptance:
- 1:1 LinkedIn master timeline created
- real product UI composited only from verified source frames
- exact text added in editor overlays, not generated image text
- captions readable on mobile
- music ducks under all voiceover
- final duration/audio delta under 100ms

issues.title: RA Wave 1: run final product-truth, rights, and market QA
issues.description:
Run the final QA gate before publish using `08-final-video-qa-report.json` and the proof sheet.

Acceptance:
- no hallucinated UI, claims, legal text, standards text, or product behavior
- no unclear asset rights
- no leaked customer/private data
- no warped logo/text
- first frame works silent
- captions readable on mobile
- audio/video duration delta under 100ms
- QA report committed and pushed

issues.title: RA Wave 1: package launch exports and thumbnail
issues.description:
Package the approved market-ready video for launch distribution.

Acceptance:
- 1:1 LinkedIn master export
- 9:16 cutdown plan or export
- thumbnail/background based on approved CTA keyframe, with real logo/text added in editor
- filename, duration, format, and target channel recorded in `06-platform-packaging.md`
- final files linked from the shutdown handoff or release note
